vehicleSwitcher.headerSwitchA11y: Active vehicle: {{name}}. Tap to switch vehicle.

photos.label: Photos
photos.cameraPermissionMessage: Camera access is required to take a photo.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.subtitle: The app encountered an unexpected error. Restarting usually fixes it.

settings.title: Settings
settings.backupSubtitle: Save a copy of all vehicles and events
settings.restoreSubtitle: Replace all current data from a backup file
settings.restoreInvalidMessage: Could not read the selected file.
settings.restoreConfirmMessage:
This backup contains {{vehicles}}, {{events}}, {{reminders}}, and {{documents}}.

Restoring will replace ALL current data. This cannot be undone.{{docNote}}
settings.restoreDocNote: Document and photo files are not included in backups and must be re-added after restore.
settings.restoreCompleteMessage: Your data has been restored successfully.
settings.helpCostPerMileSubtitle: Total spending divided by total distance driven in the selected period.
settings.helpCostPerMileA11y: Cost per mile is total spending divided by total distance driven
settings.helpFuelEfficiencySubtitle: Distance between full fill-ups divided by fuel volume. Partial fills are excluded.
settings.helpFuelEfficiencyA11y: Fuel efficiency is distance between full fill-ups divided by fuel volume
settings.helpPartialFillSubtitle: When you don't fill the tank completely. Marked partial fills are excluded from efficiency calculations because the math requires full-to-full measurements.
settings.helpRemindersSubtitle: Set a distance or time interval. AutoMate estimates when you'll reach the threshold based on your driving patterns and notifies you.
settings.loadTestDataA11y: Load test data with 2 years of sample events
settings.loadTestDataConfirmMessage: This will replace all current vehicles, events, and reminders with 2 years of sample data. This cannot be undone.
settings.loadTestDataLoadedMessage: Created {{vehicles}} vehicles, {{events}} events, and {{reminders}} reminders spanning 2 years.
settings.resetAllDataSubtitle: Delete everything and return to onboarding
settings.resetAllDataConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete all vehicles, events, and reminders. You will be returned to the onboarding screen. This cannot be undone.
settings.testErrorBoundarySubtitle: Triggers a render error to test the error screen

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noVehicleDescription: AutoMate tracks what you spend, so you always know where the money goes.
dashboard.noEventsDescription: Your next fill-up or service visit will start building your dashboard.
dashboard.celebrationLabel: First one logged! You're tracking now.
dashboard.costPerExplanation: Total spending divided by total {{unit}} driven in the selected period.
dashboard.costPerHint: Total spending divided by distance driven
dashboard.avgEffExplanation: Average fuel efficiency from full fill-ups only. Partial fills are excluded.
dashboard.fuelEfficiencyChartA11y: Fuel efficiency chart, {{count}} data points, average {{avg}} {{unit}}
dashboard.partialFillsLegend: Hollow dots = partial fills (excluded from average)
dashboard.fuelEfficiencyEmpty: Log 2 or more fill-ups to see your trend

history.title: History
history.noVehicleDescription: Add a vehicle from the Dashboard tab to start logging events here.
history.noMatchesDescription: Try a different search term or clear your filters.
history.emptyDescription: Tap + to log a fill-up, service, or expense. Each entry builds your car's story.
history.longPressA11y: {{type}} event on {{date}}, {{cost}}. Long press for options.
history.deleteMessage: You can undo this for a few seconds after.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.noVehicleDescription: Add a vehicle from the Dashboard tab, then set reminders for oil changes, inspections, and more.
reminders.emptyDescription: Set a reminder for oil changes, tire rotations, or any recurring service. AutoMate counts down so you don't have to.
reminders.notifBanner: Notifications are off. You'll only see reminders in the app.
reminders.notifBannerA11y: Notifications are off. Tap to enable in Settings.

onboarding.title: Welcome to AutoMate
onboarding.tagline: Track every mile, own every dollar.
onboarding.vinLookupA11y: Look up VIN to auto-fill vehicle details
onboarding.vinHint: Enter 17 characters, then tap Look Up. Find it on the driver's door jamb or registration.
onboarding.vinError: Couldn't look up VIN — enter details manually.
onboarding.noAccountFooter: No account required. Your data stays on your device.
onboarding.saveErrorMessage: Check your entries and try again. If this keeps happening, try restarting the app.
onboarding.restoreInvalidMessage: Could not read the selected file.
onboarding.restoreConfirmMessage:
This backup contains {{vehicles}}, {{events}}, and {{reminders}}.

This will restore all your data.
onboarding.completedDescription: Your next fill-up or service visit will start building your dashboard.
